description: Query a non-existent extension ID; verify agent handles not-found gracefully (covers `neomind extension get` error path; previously only list was covered).

turns.user: Show me the details of the extension called non-existent-ext.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind extension get non-existent-ext` (or GET /api/extensions/non-existent-ext), and after receiving the error response, clearly tells the user the extension does not exist
expectations.overall: Must actually invoke the tool, not answer from imagination; error reply must be grounded in the tool result
